description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a striped uniform consisting of a short-sleeved shirt, matching pants, and an apron tied at the waist, suggesting a service or fast-food worker. He wears a baseball cap with a logo on the front, and his shirt is partially unbuttoned at the top. The figure has a wristband and bracelet on his right wrist, and his shoes are sturdy with thick soles, suitable for long hours of standing. His facial features include a mustache and a short beard, and his hair is visible beneath the cap. The overall appearance is casual and functional, with a focus on practicality and comfort for urban or work environments.
description: An adult male in a striped service uniform with a cap, apron, and wrist accessories, standing in a relaxed pose. The outfit and accessories suggest a worker in a casual urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, apron, cap, facial hair, and wrist accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the apron tie, and the wristband on the right arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the striped shirt, apron ties, and the back of the cap and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, cap, and bracelet on the right wrist.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt, matching pants, apron, and baseball cap with logo
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with mustache and short beard
